data.body: Plan-review PASS (advisory=5, signed). Triage: (1) T8 abstain-aggregation — coverage keys enumerated as counts: cov['verify_commands_linted'] (int) + cov['verify_lint_abstained'] (int), accumulated per line into p6's single DetResult (no per-line events). (2) G6 major (input source) — lint BOTH ctx.state['verify_commands'] (the .command field) AND command-shaped lines extracted from AC text (Proof:/Verify:/backtick), since the 'present command that lies' defect is most visible in AC text. (3) detection vocabulary defined in code: (a) file-inspection verb (grep/find/ls/wc/cat/head/tail) with NO assertion token (-eq/-q/[ ]/&&/exit/jq -e/diff) -> defect; (b) unanchored grep = a bare-identifier pattern with no ^/$/\b/quoted-key/[ (] structure; (c) unquoted-metachar = a $VAR/$?/${ in the grep pattern region. Fail-open: an unrecognized command shape abstains (coverage-recorded), never false-accuses. (4) shellcheck prior-art recorded in a code comment (SC2126/SC2062/SC2086) + a test asserting the comment. (5) DET_CHECKS stays P1-P9 (extend p6, no P10).
